name: Arnold TradingView Overlay
description: Stripped 10 override keys from applyVpAnchor that TV's current FRVP study schema doesn't recognize (*.showLastValue, showStudyLastValue, showStudyArguments, showStudyTitle) — they were spamming Chart.Model.StudyPropertiesOverrider warnings ~30x/min, drowning every other console message and making diagnostics impossible. Visual behavior unchanged (POC/VAH/VAL lines still render with the same colors and price labels still hidden via showPrice:false, which the schema does still accept). Earlier: closed-trade widgets obey visible range; full info-block visibility; lotSize/accountSize/leverage/risk for qty math; bare-minimum create-call payload; trail line at placed stop.
